# OpenAI Developer Community Content Extraction

## Community Forum Overview
The OpenAI Developer Community serves as a discussion platform where developers can connect while building with OpenAI's APIs and developer tools.

## Featured Discussions & Topics

**Recent Announcements:**
- "Welcome to community.openai.com!" (August 25, 2023)
- Codex for Students program offering "$100 in credits for US and Canada"

**Active Discussion Categories:**
- API development and integration
- ChatGPT Apps and plugins
- Image generation (DALL-E 3, ImageGen, GPT-4o)
- Codex application (Windows and CLI versions)
- Prompt engineering techniques
- Commerce integration questions
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) implementation

## Notable Issues & Bug Reports

**Billing/Account Problems:**
- Codex billing errors with credit depletion
- GPT-5.4-mini token charging discrepancies
- Organization verification blocks
- Costs API pagination failures

**Technical Issues:**
- Codex Windows app performance degradation
- Caps Lock functionality failures in Codex CLI
- Data loss concerns in file operations
- ChatGPT Apps authentication flow problems
- Sora-2 API duration parameter restrictions

**Popular Discussion Threads:**
- "Prompt Engineering Is Dead" discourse (105 replies, 20,073 views)
- ImageGen/DALL-E Megathread (2,367 replies, 33,898 views)
- Kruel.ai API companion system documentation

## Platform Features
- Search functionality
- Category-based organization
- User reputation system (Original Poster, Frequent Poster designations)
- Discourse-powered infrastructure
